mapper.select: select r.id, r.plan_id, r.process_id, r.reviewed_user_id, r.reviewed_user_nick_name, r.reviewer_user_id, r.reviewer_user_nick_name, r.status, r.type, r.version, r.review_create_time, r.review_finish_time, r.reviewed_remark, r.reviewer_remark, plan.name as plan_name, process.name as process_name from review r left join submission_plan plan on r.plan_id = plan.id left join submission_process process on r.process_id = process.id where r.id = #{id}
select coalesce(max(version), 0) from review where process_id = #{processId}
mapper.insert: insert into review (plan_id, process_id, reviewed_user_id, reviewed_user_nick_name, reviewer_user_id, reviewer_user_nick_name, status, type, version, reviewed_remark, reviewer_remark, review_create_time, review_finish_time, create_time, update_time) values (#{planId}, #{processId}, #{reviewedUserId}, #{reviewedUserNickName}, #{reviewerUserId}, #{reviewerUserNickName}, #{status}, #{type}, #{version}, #{reviewedRemark}, #{reviewerRemark}, #{reviewCreateTime},#{reviewFinishTime}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
